attempts.power_terminal_experimental_method: Clone a V9 $TERINPUT record, replace marker with $TERPOWER, keep two-character label, insert before resistor object groups.

power_info.method: cloned $TERINPUT record with marker changed to $TERPOWER

attempts.note: Corrected 6R topology with original left common N0 renamed to V0 and attached to an experimental $TERPOWER terminal.

topology.role: upper right vertical in source; horizontal V9 symbol
lower right vertical 1 in source; horizontal V9 symbol
lower right vertical 2 in source; horizontal V9 symbol

limitations: This is an experimental power-terminal attempt, not a locked method.
$TERPOWER record layout has not yet been validated by controlled donor project.
V0 is used as a two-character power-net label to avoid variable-length terminal-label changes.
SCRIPTS/PWRRAILS.DAT is copied unchanged from blank E001.

attempts.note: V9 R21 reference topology with original start node N0 renamed to V0 and attached to an experimental $TERPOWER terminal.
topology_summary: Branch A: V0 - R1 - A1 - R2 - A2 - R3 - A3 - R4 - A4 - R5 - A5 - R6 - A6 - R7 - M0
Branch B: V0 - R8 - B1 - R9 - B2 - RA - B3 - RB - B4 - RC - B5 - RD - B6 - RE - M0
Tail: M0 - RF - C1 - RG - C2 - RH - C3 - RI - C4 - RJ - C5 - RK - C6 - RL - Z0
limitations: This is an experimental power-terminal attempt, not a locked method.
$TERPOWER record layout has not yet been validated by controlled donor project.
V0 is used as a two-character power-net label to avoid variable-length terminal-label changes.
SCRIPTS/PWRRAILS.DAT is copied unchanged from blank E001.
